title: Premium onboarding hero animation
user_brief: Animate this product visual with premium enterprise motion.

video_parameters.subject_motion: subtle UI glow and gentle depth movement

prompt: Create a 6-second premium enterprise product animation based on the provided start frame. Use a slow camera push-in, subtle UI glow, and soft gradient lighting movement. Preserve the product shape, layout, and brand colors. The motion should feel calm, polished, and suitable for a LinkedIn product launch.
negative_prompt: Avoid fast motion, sci-fi effects, unstable geometry, glitch effects, fake text, distorted UI, excessive glow, camera shake, and flicker.
